summary: Quick Actions feature testing completed successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend Playwright tests passed. The 3 quick action buttons (Log Note, Assign, Message) in the peek panel footer transform into inline forms, submit correctly with toast notifications, and revert to buttons.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for backend tests (auto-generated athlete IDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Actions feature fully working. Data-testids: note-form, note-form-text, note-tag-{tag}, note-form-submit, note-form-back, assign-form, assign-option-{owner}, assign-form-reason, assign-form-submit, assign-form-back, message-form, message-recipient-{recipient}, message-form-text, message-form-submit, message-form-back. Toast patterns: 'Note logged', 'Assigned to {owner}', 'Message sent to {recipient}'. Escape key closes form first, then panel. All actions persist to MongoDB and can be retrieved via GET /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/timeline.
mocked_api_note: Intervention data is MOCKED (mock_data.py), but quick actions (notes, assignments, messages) PERSIST IN MONGODB

notes_api: POST /api/athletes/{id}/notes creates note with text only
POST /api/athletes/{id}/notes creates note with text and tag
Note persists in MongoDB and appears in timeline
assign_api: Assignment persists in MongoDB and appears in timeline
messages_api: POST /api/athletes/{id}/messages creates message with recipient and text
Message persists in MongoDB and appears in timeline
timeline_api: GET /api/athletes/{id}/timeline returns notes, assignments, messages arrays
Returns empty arrays for athlete with no actions
integration: Full note flow with multiple notes
Multiple action types for same athlete

note_form: Clicking 'Log Note' button transforms footer into note form
Note form has textarea, tag pills (Check-in, Follow-up, Update, Concern, Positive), submit button
Note form submits successfully with 'Note logged' toast
Form reverts to action buttons after submit
Back button (chevron) cancels and reverts to buttons
assign_form: Assign form filters out current owner from options
Shows owner options: Assistant Coach Davis, Parent/Guardian, Athlete, Academic Advisor
Form reverts to action buttons after submit
Back button cancels and reverts to buttons
message_form: Recipient pills: Parent/Guardian, Athlete, Assistant Coach Davis, Academic Advisor
Textarea hidden until recipient selected (correct UX)
Selecting recipient reveals textarea with placeholder
Submit works and reverts to action buttons
Back button cancels and reverts to buttons
escape_key: Escape key closes active form but keeps panel open
Escape key closes panel when no form is active
original_functionality: Peek panel still displays all explainability content
Priority alert cards still open peek panel
